sizing_rule.note: Diversify across market systems only if portfolio geometric mean exceeds single-system geometric mean. Use formula: TWR = ((AHPR²-SD²)^0.5)^N. Trade only the composition (single or multiple systems) that maximizes geometric mean. Author silent on optimal_f value and Kelly fraction.

source_rule_text: Diversify into multiple market systems only up to the point that maximizes geometric mean; a single system may be optimal if it produces the highest geometric mean.
